problem: The CLI has comment commands for tickets (hlx comments list/post) but no library commands at all. The ticket requires CLI and MCP access for library feedback — reading/posting section-level ratings and comments on library items, viewing other people's comments, and triggering iteration rounds.

files.why: Existing comment command router: list and post subcommands for ticket comments. Reference pattern for library comment CLI commands.
Lists ticket comments with --helix-only and --since filters. GET /api/tickets/{ticketId}/comments. Reference for library comment listing.
Posts a comment to a ticket. POST /api/tickets/{ticketId}/comments with { content }. Reference for library comment posting.
Main CLI entry point with switch routing: login, token, org, tickets, comments, inspect, skill, update. No 'library' command. Extension point to add library subcommand.
HTTP client with API key / bearer auth, retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff), 30s timeout. All API calls route through this.
Multi-org config management. ~/.hlx/config.json with HELIX_API_KEY / HELIX_URL env fallbacks.
Flag parsing utilities: getFlag(), hasFlag(), isHelpRequested(). Used by all command modules.
Ticket reference resolution: accepts ID, short ID, or ticket number. Comments module uses this. Library commands would need similar resolution for library items.
Bundled skill documentation for agent integration. Documents all CLI operations. Would need update with library commands.
Ticket command module: list, get, create, continue, rerun. Reference for library command structure.
Minimal deps: TypeScript, @types/node only. Scripts: build (tsc), dev (tsx watch), typecheck, lint.

facts: CLI uses a custom router pattern (switch statement in src/index.ts), not commander or yargs. No external CLI framework dependency.
Comment commands exist for tickets only: hlx comments list [--ticket <ref>] [--helix-only] [--since <iso>] and hlx comments post [--ticket <ref>] <message>.
No library command module exists — src/library/ directory does not exist.
Ticket reference resolution (resolve-ticket.ts) accepts internal ID, short ID (e.g. BLD-339), or ticket number. Library items would need similar resolution.
SKILL.md documents all CLI operations for agent integration (hlx skill show/install). New library commands must be added here for MCP/agent access.
HTTP client supports both API key (hxi_ prefix) and Bearer token auth with X-Helix-Org-ID header.
Each command module follows a consistent pattern: index.ts (router + usage), subcommand files (list.ts, post.ts, etc.), flag parsing via lib/flags.ts.
unknowns: Whether library comment CLI commands should be a subcommand of a new 'library' module (hlx library comments ...) or extend the existing 'comments' module with a --library flag.
How section-level targeting works in CLI — whether users specify a heading slug, line range, or copy-paste the section text.
Whether the CLI needs a 'library list' and 'library show' command before comments can be targeted.
How rating (thumbs up/down/love) is expressed in CLI — flag-based (--rating thumbs-up), positional argument, or emoji shorthand.
